FAQ Boxes

Preview the FAQ widget below, then copy or download the Brightspace-ready HTML.

Preview

Course FAQ

Where do I submit assignments?

Submissions are located in Assignments. If you don’t see it yet, check the module release conditions.

How do I contact the instructor?

Use Tools → Classlist from the navigation bar to find instructor contact options.

Why don’t I see future content?

Some items are released by date or completion requirements, unless hidden by the instructor.
